description:
"Did you hear that?"


(Harken Die Of Death reference real roblox i hate you)

Ingame Bio - A creature that comes from another dimension where noise is deadly. She lived there for her whole life and gained a great sense of hearing, but too much noise makes her feel vite. Harken got taken from her dimension for experiments, but they made too much noise and she went mayhem. All of the noise in the different world made her go insane and was going to kill everyone that did.

i just really like her design that's all, dead dove because bro might genuinely kill you.





i did not put that much effort into this thing at all so forgive me
